iauc_convention: trapezoids at each arm-fold actual cumulative physical-work coordinate, then hold the final posterior through the indivisible tail to the common final cap; normalize by that cap
next_action: If BUILD LOO transfers, freeze this architecture and attack one never-trained disjoint full-256 pool. Otherwise preserve per-fold agency/stationarity breadcrumbs and change the packet reader or credit model without regenerating these pools.

result_commitment.scope: all report fields except volatile execution resources
